CREATE TABLE test_data (x Float64, y Float64);
SELECT arrayReduce('simpleLinearRegression', x, y) FROM test_data;
CREATE TABLE test_data_2 AS SELECT arrayJoin([0, 2, 4]) AS x, arrayJoin([0, 1, 4]) AS y;
SELECT arrayReduce('simpleLinearRegression', x, y) AS regression FROM test_data_2;
SELECT a.x, a.y, arrayReduce('simpleLinearRegression', a.x, a.y) AS regression FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([0, 1, 2]) AS x, arrayJoin([1, 3, 5]) AS y) AS a;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (id UInt32, x Float64, y Float64);
SELECT avg(a.y) AS avg_y, arrayReduce('simpleLinearRegression', a.x, a.y) AS regression FROM (SELECT x, y FROM complex_data WHERE id < 4) AS a;
SELECT arrayReduce('simpleLinearRegression', x, y) FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([1, 2, 3, 4]) AS x, arrayJoin([2, 4, 6, 8]) AS y) AS sub;
CREATE TABLE external_data (x Float64, y Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT arrayReduce('simpleLinearRegression', t.x, t.y) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM external_data) AS t;
SELECT k, b FROM (SELECT arrayReduce('simpleLinearRegression', x, y) AS (k, b) FROM test_data WHERE x > 0) AS result;
SELECT arrayReduce('simpleLinearRegression', x, y) FROM (SELECT x + 1 AS x, y + 1 AS y FROM test_data) AS adjusted_data;
